# terrible_ibm_storage_virtualize_ibm_svc_manage_replication (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `clustername` (String) The hostname or management IP of the Storage Virtualize system.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `state` (String) Creates or updates (`present`), removes (`absent`) a remote copy relationship.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `aux` (String) Specifies the auxiliary volume name when creating a remote copy.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `consistgrp` (String) Specifies a consistency group that this relationship will join. If not specified by user, the relationship is created as a stand-alone relationship. Applies when *state=present*.
- `copytype` (String) Specifies the mirror type of the remote copy. 'metro' means MetroMirror, 'global' means GlobalMirror, and 'GMCV' means GlobalMirror with change volume. If not specified, a MetroMirror remote copy will be created when creating a remote copy *state=present*.
- `cyclingperiod` (Number) Specifies the cycle period in seconds. The default cycle is of 300 seconds.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `domain` (String) Domain for the Storage Virtualize system. Valid when hostname is used for the parameter *clustername*.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `force` (Boolean) Specifies that the relationship must be deleted even if it results in the secondary volume containing inconsistent data.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `log_path` (String) Path of debug log file.
- `master` (String) Specifies the master volume name when creating a remote copy.
- `name` (String) Specifies the name to assign to the new remote copy relationship or to operate on the existing remote copy.
- `noconsistgrp` (Boolean) Specifies whether to remove the specified relationship from a consistency group, making the relationship a stand-alone relationship. Applies when *state=present*.
- `password` (String) REST API password for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters *username* and *password* are required if not using *token* to authenticate a user.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `remotecluster` (String) Specifies the name of remote cluster when creating a remote copy.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `sync` (Boolean) Specifies whether to create a synchronized relationship.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `token` (String) The authentication token to verify a user on the Storage Virtualize system. To generate a token, use the ibm_svc_auth module.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `username` (String) REST API username for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters *username* and *password* are required if not using *token* to authenticate a user.
- `validate_certs` (Boolean) Validates certification.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
